subject: Chemistry
questionText: The first ionization energy generally decreases from left to right of a period in the periodic table.

subject: Chemistry
questionText: The electron affinity of the elements in a period generally increases from left to right of the Periodic Table.

subject: Chemistry
questionText: The first ionization energy of the elements in Group 1 of the Periodic Table decreases down the group.

subject: Chemistry
questionText: The hybridization of carbon in ethene is sp2.

subject: Chemistry
questionText: The hybridization of carbon of the carbonyl group is sp2.

subject: Chemistry
questionText: The hybridization of oxygen in methanol is sp2.

subject: Chemistry
questionText: Addition of NH3 solution to an aqueous solution of Pb2+ ions produces a white precipitate.

subject: Chemistry
questionText: Addition of NaOH solution to an aqueous solution of Cu2+ produces a blue gelatinous precipitate.

subject: Chemistry
questionText: Addition of NaOH solution to an aqueous solution of Ca2+ ions gives no observable change.
